items.summaryZh: 一项对 NACOX 队列中 112 名患者进行的定性分析确定了驱动力与动机、治疗与恢复、以及医疗许可与准备这三个主要类别，这些因素决定了 ACL 损伤患者重返运动的决策。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study deeply analyzes the mindset, effort, and support factors influencing ACL injury patients' return-to-sport decisions. When guiding patients to RTS, you must not only assess physiological indicators but also understand and support their psychological state and external support systems.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性分析，结果基于患者自由文本回答，可能存在信息遗漏和解释偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative analysis, and the results are based on patients' free-text answers, which may have information omissions and interpretation bias.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey of physical therapists treating pediatric and adolescent patients post-ACL injury explored factors affecting clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) use and exercise prescription.
items.curatedReason: 这项调查揭示了物理治疗师在 ACL 损伤儿童和青少年患者中使用血流限制训练（BFRT）时的临床决策影响因素。它有助于你了解 BFRT 在儿科 PT 实践中的实际应用现状及其与研究的一致性。
items.titleZh: 影响儿童和青少年前交叉韧带损伤患者血流限制训练临床决策的因素
items.summaryZh: 一项针对治疗 ACL 损伤后儿童和青少年患者的物理治疗师的横断面调查，探讨了影响血流限制训练（BFRT）使用和运动处方临床决策的因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey reveals factors influencing physical therapists' clinical decisions when using blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients with ACL injuries. It helps you understand the current practical application of BFRT in pediatric PT and its concordance with research.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，依赖于物理治疗师的自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚和报告偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional survey, relying on physical therapists' self-reports, which may involve recall and reporting bias.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: The Perspective and Needs of Older Adults With Osteoporosis With a Recent Upper Extremity Fragility Fracture Concerning Fall Risk and Fear of Falling.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored the perspectives of older adults with osteoporosis who had upper extremity fractures, focusing on their health concerns, the impact of falls and fear of falling (FoF) on daily life, and their views on rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究深刻揭示了骨质疏松性上肢脆性骨折老年患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法和需求。在制定这类患者的康复计划时，你必须把跌倒恐惧和心理支持作为核心要素，而不仅仅是骨折的机械愈合。
items.titleZh: 骨质疏松性上肢脆性骨折老年患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法和需求
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了骨质疏松性上肢脆性骨折老年患者的观点，重点关注他们的健康问题、跌倒及跌倒恐惧（FoF）对日常生活的影响以及他们对康复的看法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study profoundly reveals the perspectives and needs of older adults with osteoporotic upper extremity fragility fractures regarding fall risk and fear of falling. When developing rehabilitation plans for these patients, you must prioritize fear of falling and psychological support as core elements, not just mechanical fracture healing.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量较小，结果主要反映受访者的主观经验，不具普遍推论性。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size, and the results primarily reflect the subjective experiences of the interviewees, lacking generalizability.

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: A single-blind randomized controlled trial with 28 recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability found dynamic taping to be as effective as sports taping in improving dynamic balance and proprioception immediately post-application.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，动态贴扎在改善慢性踝关节不稳（CAI）患者的动态平衡和本体感觉方面，可能与传统运动贴扎效果相当。对于寻求不限制运动的辅助支持的 CAI 患者，可以考虑使用动态贴扎。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳休闲运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 28 名慢性踝关节不稳休闲运动员的单盲随机对照试验发现，动态贴扎在应用后即刻改善动态平衡和本体感觉方面，与运动贴扎效果相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that dynamic taping may be as effective as traditional sports taping in improving dynamic balance and proprioception in patients with chronic ankle instability (CAI). For CAI patients seeking auxiliary support without restricting movement, dynamic taping can be considered.
items.limitation: 本研究为单盲随机对照试验，样本量较小（28 人），随访期短（即时效应），长期效果尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-blind randomized controlled trial with a small sample size (28 participants) and short follow-up (immediate effects), so long-term effects are unclear.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Biomechanical effects of Kinesio versus Mulligan ankle taping on balance and ankle function in chronic STROKE: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial with 33 chronic stroke individuals found significant group differences in ankle dorsiflexion passive range of motion and balance after six weeks of Kinesio taping with treadmill training, Mulligan taping with treadmill training, or treadmill training alone.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 提示，Kinesio 贴扎或 Mulligan 贴扎结合跑步机训练，可能比单纯跑步机训练更能改善慢性卒中患者的踝关节背屈活动度、平衡和踝关节功能。在治疗慢性卒中患者时，你可以考虑将这些贴扎技术整合到训练方案中。
items.titleZh: Kinesio 贴扎与 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎对慢性卒中患者平衡和踝关节功能的生物力学效应：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项对 33 名慢性卒中患者进行的随机对照试验发现，在为期六周的 Kinesio 贴扎结合跑步机训练、Mulligan 贴扎结合跑步机训练或单独跑步机训练后，踝关节背屈被动活动度和平衡方面存在显著的组间差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that Kinesio taping or Mulligan taping combined with treadmill training may improve ankle dorsiflexion ROM, balance, and ankle function more than treadmill training alone in chronic stroke patients. When treating chronic stroke patients, you can consider integrating these taping techniques into training protocols.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量较小（33 人），且结果主要集中在短期效应，长期效果需进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: This study has a small sample size (33 participants) and primarily focuses on short-term effects; long-term effects require further research.

items.title: Effectiveness of manual therapy with pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain: a pilot randomized clinical trial.
items.summary: This pilot randomized clinical trial involving 68 participants found that pragmatic physiotherapy with manual therapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain was feasible and showed preliminary treatment effects on patient-reported outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步 RCT 表明，对于肩袖相关性肩痛，在常规物理治疗中加入手法治疗是可行的，且可能带来额外的治疗效果。可以将其作为未来更大规模研究的依据。
items.titleZh: 手法治疗结合务实物理治疗对肩袖相关性肩痛的有效性：一项初步随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 这项初步随机临床试验纳入了 68 名受试者，发现手法治疗结合务实物理治疗对肩袖相关性肩痛是可行的，并对患者报告结局显示出初步疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot RCT indicates that incorporating manual therapy into pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain is feasible and may offer additional therapeutic benefits. This can serve as a basis for larger future studies.
items.limitation: 本研究是初步性随机临床试验，样本量相对较小，效应量需在更大规模的 RCT 中进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot randomized clinical trial with a relatively small sample size, and the effect sizes need further validation in larger RCTs.

items.title: Adapting the MSK-HQ for paediatric musculoskeletal care: Insights from a national survey and focus group of physiotherapists.
items.summary: A national survey and focus group of 55 pediatric clinicians in the UK indicated a need and relevance for adapting the Musculoskeletal Health Questionnaire (MSK-HQ) for use in pediatric musculoskeletal services.
items.curatedReason: 英国物理治疗师普遍认为，骨骼肌肉健康问卷（MSK-HQ）有潜力适应儿童和青少年骨骼肌肉护理。这提示未来该工具在儿科 PT 中会有更广应用，值得关注其发展。
items.titleZh: 儿童青少年骨骼肌肉护理中 MSK-HQ 的适应性：一项全国物理治疗师调查和焦点小组的见解
items.summaryZh: 一项涵盖英国 55 名儿科临床医师的全国调查和焦点小组研究表明，有必要且适宜将骨骼肌肉健康问卷（MSK-HQ）应用于儿童青少年骨骼肌肉服务。
items.curatedReasonEn: UK physiotherapists generally believe that the Musculoskeletal Health Questionnaire (MSK-HQ) has potential for adaptation in pediatric musculoskeletal care. This suggests future broader application of the tool in pediatric PT, and its development is worth monitoring.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性调查和焦点小组研究，不涉及干预效果评价，结果仅反映受访者观点。
items.limitationEn: This study is a qualitative survey and focus group study, not evaluating intervention effects, and the results only reflect the perspectives of the respondents.

items.title: Usefulness of ChatGPT in physiotherapy practice: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapping current evidence on ChatGPT's use in musculoskeletal physiotherapy found studies focused on how the technology was studied, rather than its effectiveness or readiness for clinical practice.
items.curatedReason: 该综述梳理了 ChatGPT 在物理治疗实践中的现有研究，主要集中于技术如何被研究。这表明 AI 工具在 PT 领域尚处于探索阶段，目前以工具研究为主，离临床应用还有距离。
items.titleZh: ChatGPT 在物理治疗实践中的实用性：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项关于 ChatGPT 在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中应用的范围综述发现，现有研究主要关注该技术的研究方式，而非其有效性或临床实践准备情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review surveys existing research on ChatGPT in physiotherapy practice, focusing on how the technology has been studied. This indicates that AI tools in PT are still in an exploratory phase, primarily centered on tool research, and are some distance from clinical application.
items.limitation: 此为范围综述，不进行证据的质量评估或有效性评价，仅描绘研究现状。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review that does not critically appraise evidence quality or effectiveness, only mapping the current research landscape.
